text.message: And why robbing me instead of the far ahead orange? Very odd
I’m doing deceptively bad btw, no port or real future
I get I have a city but this is wild
Are we done now I legit can’t win
I’d do some of these trades but for some reason I’m embargoed
One pt behind me with no road but they’re going to take road easily
Maybe red but def not me
I mean red might win this round
Gg lol, got super lucky this game
